title: Wear resistant aluminum alloy with superior machinability
abstract:
PURPOSE: To improve the machinability of a wear resistant Al alloy contg. Si without deteriorating the wear resistance by reducing the Si content and adding specified elements.
CONSTITUTION: The composition of a wear resistant Al-Si alloy is composed of 1.0W4.5% Si, 1.0W6.0% Cu, 0.2W3.0% Mg, two or more among 0.1W5.0% each of Pb, Sn and Bi, and the balance Al. The amount of Si which improves the wear resistance but deteriorates the machinability is reduced, Cu and Mg are added to compensate reduction in the wear resistance and strength, and two or more among, Pb, Sn and Bi are added to improve the machinability.
